posts.author: Tailgunnerjoe
posts.title: Wes Moore ,the Governor of Maryland, is a prick.  Thank you for your attention to this matter

link_metadata.description: The Governor of the Great State of Maryland, Wes Moore, has put a halt to all work being done at Joint Base Andrews Air Force Base, concerning the renovation and restoration of their two old and dilapidated Golf Courses, into two, World Class, Jack Nicklaus Designed Courses, plus nine additional holes, also designed by Jack, specially adapted for our Wounded Warriors. By doing this, the Governor is attacking the United States Air Force, and our Military, not a smart thing to do. These Courses exist, they are terrible, Jack Nicklaus will make them GREAT. Why should the Air Force and other Military personnel be forced to wait through a long Legal Review process and, perhaps, even more so, why should Wounded Warriors be forced to travel long distances to play Golf somewhere else or, worse yet, not play Golf at all. Our Soldiers and Veterans deserve THE BEST — NO WAITING, NO GAMES! Thank you for your attention to this matter. President DONALD J. TRUMP
link_metadata.title: Donald J. Trump (@realDonaldTrump)

posts.raw_content:
Someone asked a black woman who was there with her son what she was planning for Juneteenth. 

This woman started going off on Juneteenth "nonsense". She said people who push it are racists. 

The woman who wished it asked, "what about black slaves being freed and all the racism against black people today?"

"The Declaration of Independence and The Constitution," replied this black lady. "That's when we got freedom. That's the 4th of July. Independence Day!" She repeated that people who push Juneteenth are the racists.

"I was born in 1967 in the south. I remember when I was a little girl they were having some sort of goings on and they needed volunteers. My mom showed up with her hair in curlers, a cigarette hanging out of the corner of her mouth, dragging other moms with her to volunteer. She said that if the school is giving your child an education, you better 'get your ass' down there to help when they ask for help."

She said that her education was freedom, from the time she was born she was free. Black people who complain are looking for something to complain about. They just love to complain so they don't have to work. She said that her mother taught her about work when she volunteered at that school.

Her son kept looking it up, pointing to his phone. "There's the Declaration...there's the Constitution."

Terrific.
